## Summary

Explain the change and its player impact in clear English.

## Compatibility

Describe effects on saves, key bindings, configuration, multiplayer, public Lua
interfaces, and other mods. State “none” where applicable.

## Validation

- [ ] `git diff --check`
- [ ] `LUA=lua5.1 LUAC=luac5.1 scripts/validate.sh`
- [ ] Production ZIP contents reviewed
- [ ] Licensed client/dedicated acceptance requested when runtime behavior changed
- [ ] Documentation and release notes use English only
